race.comment: NOVELA (6) returned in fine fashion with a solid win over this course and distance and winning jockey Guernier stays in the saddle. Again gets the benefit of her 3kg claim and is capable of bringing up back-to-back victories to start the campaign. DALT JAZ (9) was a touch plain at the latest effort but the form prior was good enough for a race like this. Can bounce right back without surprising. CIFONELLI (8) has only missed a drum once in five spins around this circuit and only needs some luck from the wide draw to feature in the finish. NOLAN (4) has a win and two placings from five starts over this track and trip and will be rock-hard fit for this contest. In the mix on best figures. KHUMBILA (3) next in line.
